field.origin.description: List column for the full origin

placeholder.title.message: Shown in the browser tab and the subsite header

message.indexTip.message: Spin up a branded subsite under this parent — each one has its own logo, title, and feature set, no source-level deploy required.

message.empty.message: You haven't created any subsites yet. Click "Create subsite" to get started.

message.slugTip.message: 3-32 lowercase letters, digits, or hyphens; no leading/trailing hyphen, no consecutive hyphens.

message.slugInvalid.message: Subdomain prefix is not valid. Check the rules and try again.

message.zoneMissing.message: This parent site has no subdomain zone configured. Contact the site administrator.

message.createFailed.message: Failed to create subsite. Please try again.

message.openNowConfirm.message: Subsite {origin} has been created. Open it now to continue configuring?
